details.productUrlName: March of the World Ooze First Place Foil

customAttributes.description:
Creatures you control have base power and toughness 6/6 and are Oozes in addition to their other types.
Whenever an opponent casts a spell, if it's not their turn, you create a 3/3 green Elephant creature token.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 2/14/2025. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"The fauna here functions as a planar antibody."
—Rashmi, aether-seer
